title: Dairy product analogues comprising milk fat
abstract: The dairy product analogues comprise plant proteins and milk fat. Processes for preparing such dairy product analogues are also disclosed.
claims: Claims 1. A dairy product analogue which comprises plant proteins, milk fat and wherein less than 20% of all the proteins of the dairy product analogue are milk proteins. 2. A dairy product analogue according to claim 1, wherein the milk fat is provided as milk fat isolate. 3. A dairy product analogue according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the dairy product analogue is devoid of milk proteins. 4. A dairy product analogue according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the dairy product analogue is devoid of any milk compound except milk fat. 5. A dairy product analogue according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the plant proteins comprise, preferably consist of plant proteins selected from the group consisting of cereal proteins, pulse proteins and combination thereof. 6. A dairy product analogue according to any one of the preceding claims, comprising at least 0.5wt% plant proteins. 7. A dairy product analogue according to any one of the preceding claims, comprising at least 0.5wt% milk fat. 8. A dairy product analogue according to any one of the preceding claims, which is beverage. 9. A dairy product analogue according to claim 8, wherein the beverage is a liquid beverage or powdered beverage. 10. A dairy product analogue according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the dairy product analogue is a liquid milk analogue or powdered milk analogue. 11. A dairy product analogue according to any one of the preceding claims, which is plain. 12. A process for preparing a dairy product analogue comprising the steps of: a) dispersing a plant protein ingredient with an aqueous liquid to form a plant protein dispersion, b) mixing the plant protein dispersion of step a) with milkfat, and optionally additional ingredients to obtain a food mixture, c) homogenizing the food mixture, d) heat treating the food mixture to obtain a dairy product analogue, e) optionally, drying the dairy product analogue, wherein less than 20% of all the proteins of the dairy product analogue are milk proteins. 13. A process according to claim 12, wherein the dairy product analogue is a dairy product analogue according to any one of claims 1 to 11. 14. A process according to claim 12 or 13, wherein the dairy product analogue is a beverage.
